name: Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Flows
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC (File Hash) related to MaaS (i.e: Emotet Trojan and Trickbot Trojan) is observed.

Note: The Malware as a Service_SHA1, Malware as a Service_SHA256, Malware as a Service_MD5 have been prepopulated. Tune these Reference Sets with relevant IOC.
conditions_text: when the flow matches File Hash is not N/A

when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware as a Service_MD5', "File Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware as a Service_SHA1', "File Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware as a Service_SHA256', "File Hash") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches File Hash is not N/A

AND when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware as a Service_MD5', "File Hash") OR  REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware as a Service_SHA1', "File Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware as a Service_SHA256', "File Hash") AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Malware as a Service Hash IOC
Event description: This rule triggers when an IOC (File Hash) related to MaaS (i.e: Emotet Trojan and Trickbot Trojan) is observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
